label: DeepMind — AlphaFold HQ
sub: Origin of AlphaFold protein structure prediction; 214M+ structures freely available, transforming drug discovery and vaccine development globally since 2021

label: MIT — AI Drug Discovery
sub: MIT researchers used deep learning to discover Halicin, the first novel antibiotic in decades, screening 100M+ compounds in days (Cell, February 2020)

label: Google Health — Mountain View
sub: Google AI for breast cancer screening (Nature 2020), flood forecasting, and AlphaMissense genomics; AI deployed across 80+ countries

label: Qure.ai — Mumbai
sub: AI chest X-ray analysis for tuberculosis screening deployed in 1,000+ centers across India and Africa; ~90% sensitivity enabling same-day results in rural areas

label: Nairobi — AI Community Health
sub: Google-supported AI health diagnostics including TB screening and community health worker AI tools deployed across Kenyan public health system

label: Cape Town — AI Pathology
sub: PathAI and local university partnerships deploy AI-powered pathology slide analysis for cancer diagnosis, reducing diagnostic delays from weeks to hours

label: Singapore — AI Health Hub
sub: National AI strategy includes AI diagnostics in all public hospitals; Singapore Health Services AI-powered early sepsis detection and diabetic retinopathy screening deployed nationally

label: Makerere University — Cassava AI
sub: Nuru AI plant disease app for cassava blight detection, reaching 40M+ smallholder farmers across sub-Saharan Africa with offline, multilingual mobile diagnostics

label: Lagos — PlantVillage Network
sub: PlantVillage AI crop disease detection and agricultural advisory network across Nigeria, reaching smallholder maize and cassava farmers with real-time disease alerts

label: Addis Ababa — FAO Locust AI
sub: FAO AI satellite tracking system for desert locust swarms coordinated from Addis Ababa during East Africa's worst infestation in 70 years (2020); protected crops for 25M+ at-risk people

label: Pune — Precision Farming AI
sub: Cropin and ICRISAT AI platforms for precision agriculture serving 7M+ Indian farmers with crop yield prediction, disease alerts, and climate-adaptive farming recommendations

label: São Paulo — EMBRAPA Agri AI
sub: EMBRAPA and Microsoft AI for Agriculture partnership: satellite-based crop monitoring, yield forecasting, and soil health AI covering 60M+ hectares of Brazilian farmland

label: Dhaka — Google Flood AI
sub: Google AI flood forecasting providing 7-day advance alerts in Bangladesh; over 30M people reached via Android, Google Search, and SMS partnerships with national disaster management

label: Tokyo — Seismic Early Warning AI
sub: Japan Meteorological Agency's AI-enhanced earthquake early warning system; machine learning differentiates P-waves and S-waves to issue alerts with 5-10 second lead time before shaking arrives

label: Manila — PAGASA Typhoon AI
sub: Philippines Atmospheric Service AI-enhanced typhoon track prediction and storm surge modeling; critical for one of the world's most typhoon-prone nations with 20 million people in high-risk coastal zones

label: Jakarta — BMKG Flood AI
sub: Indonesian Meteorological Agency AI flood and volcanic hazard monitoring; ML-enhanced early warning for flooding that annually displaces hundreds of thousands of Jakarta residents

label: San Diego — ALERTCalifornia AI
sub: UC San Diego ALERTCalifornia wildfire detection network: 1,000+ AI cameras detect ignition within 8 minutes across California, Oregon, and Nevada; coordinated with CAL FIRE emergency dispatch

label: Kathmandu — ICIMOD Mountain AI
sub: International Centre for Integrated Mountain Development AI for glacier lake outburst flood (GLOF) early warning across the Hindu Kush Himalayan region; protects 240M mountain-dependent people

label: Redmond — Microsoft AI for Accessibility
sub: Microsoft AI for Accessibility program ($25M+ grants); Seeing AI, Project Euphonia for atypical speech, live captions, and AI-powered AAC devices deployed globally for disability communities

label: Copenhagen — Be My Eyes
sub: Be My Eyes integrated GPT-4 Vision in March 2023 to provide 24/7 AI visual assistance to 500K+ blind and low-vision users globally; landmark demonstration of foundation models for disability access

label: Boston — AI Augmentative Communication
sub: Boston-area research institutions and companies developing AI-powered AAC (Augmentative and Alternative Communication) devices; ML models predict intended speech from eye-tracking and brain signals for ALS/motor neuron disease patients

label: Kyoto — AI Hearing Aid Research
sub: Kyoto University and industry partners developing AI-powered hearing aids with real-time noise suppression and speaker separation; ML hearing aids outperform traditional DSP chips in noisy environments

label: Mountain View — Khan Academy Khanmigo
sub: Khan Academy launched Khanmigo (GPT-4 Socratic tutor) in March 2023; deployed across 40+ countries with subsidized access for under-resourced schools globally

label: Paris — UNESCO AI Education
sub: UNESCO AI in Education framework and Global Education Coalition; 2023 guidance on generative AI in schools adopted by 40+ national education ministries; emphasis on equity and teacher training

label: Nairobi — AI Literacy Programs
sub: USAID-supported and Google.org-funded AI literacy programs in Kenya; reaching 500K+ students with AI fundamentals, coding, and critical thinking curricula in English and Swahili

label: Copenhagen — Novo Nordisk AI Drug Discovery
sub: Novo Nordisk HQ in Bagsværd; April 2026 partnership with OpenAI to apply large-scale AI to drug development for diabetes and obesity affecting 800M+ people globally

label: Rome — WFP HungerMap Live
sub: World Food Programme HQ; April 2026 launch of HungerMap Live AI platform providing anticipatory food security intelligence across 50+ countries; 7-to-1 ROI on AI-triggered early intervention vs. reactive response

label: Geneva — ITU AI for Good
sub: International Telecommunication Union AI for Good programme; global youth robotics challenges, accessibility AI sessions, and July 2026 AI for Good Global Summit at Palexpo; central hub for UN AI for development agenda
